items.title: Abu Dhabi's Mubadala Capital joins tokenization push as Coinbase takes stake in onchain fund
items.whyYouShouldCare: Mubadala Capital's involvement in tokenization and Coinbase's investment in an onchain fund could enhance institutional interest and liquidity in the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Solana Changelog: July 23, 2026
items.whyYouShouldCare: The latest Solana Changelog highlights ongoing infrastructure improvements, which are crucial for enhancing network performance and supporting increased usage.

items.title: Analyzing Solana’s $5.8B RWA surge: Is SOL/ETH breakout next?
items.whyYouShouldCare: The significant rise in Solana's real-world asset (RWA) market could position SOL favorably against ETH, potentially increasing its market share and liquidity.
